Athletic Department Banners for Indoor Gymnasium & Stadium Display

Premium Vinyl Athletic Banners - Custom Printed for Championship Recognition & Team Spirit

PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Size (H x W): Quantity: Material Selection: Production Time: Finishing Options: PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Athletic Banner Material for Indoor Team Recognition

Make the most of your next athletic event with eye-catching athletic department banners. From championship recognition and team spirit displays to sports banquet decorations and gymnasium installations, we can help you improve your visibility and make an unforgettable first impression with our professionally designed custom athletic banners.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver a banner that you're proud to hang in your gymnasium or stadium. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your vision to reality. One of the ways we do this is through strict quality checks. Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years. They're deeply familiar with the nuances of the athletic banner industry and are dedicated to collaborating to ensure you receive a tailor-made athletic department banner. If something doesn't meet our standards, our staff of in-house graphic designers will contact you to fix it immediately. Your satisfaction is our number one priority.

We offer a wide selection of custom athletic banners and signage options, including sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and you can even choose production time to ensure your banner is delivered when you need it. Get started on your championship banner today. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to our in-house customer support team.

Six Customizable Banner Materials

Your athletic banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that pop. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please ask your customer service representative to discuss your specific application.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Athletic Banners
Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular athletic banner material. It has a low shine and rich color gamut perfect for indoor gymnasium displays.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl Athletic Banners
Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine to it that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics to give your athletic banners a high-end look.

18 oz Vinyl Athletic Banners
Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality for long-lasting athletic displays.

Mesh Athletic Banners
Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim that allows a 37% airflow. Mesh banners are ideal for outdoor stadium and windy conditions.

Fabric Athletic Banners
Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend material called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor gymnasium displays and has a low shine that produces a high-end look and feel.

Adhesive Athletic Banners
Standard Tack Vinyl: Standard tack vinyl can be used both indoors and outdoors, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained.
Extreme Tack Vinyl: Extreme Tack vinyl is white calendered vinyl material with a high tack adhesive that is specifically designed to adhere to low energy surfaces.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Athletic Banner Material for Indoor Team Recognition

Your athletic department banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant team colors that pop. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Athletic Banners
Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular athletic banner material. It has a low shine and rich color gamut perfect for indoor gymnasium displays and championship recognition banners.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl Athletic Banners
Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine to it that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics to give your athletic banners a high-end look for team spirit displays.

18 oz Vinyl Athletic Banners
Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality for long-lasting athletic displays.

Mesh Athletic Banners
Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim that allows a 37% airflow. Mesh banners are ideal for outdoor stadium installations and windy conditions.

Fabric Athletic Banners
Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend material called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor gymnasium displays and has a low shine that produces a high-end look and feel for championship banners.

Adhesive Athletic Banners
Standard Tack Vinyl: Standard tack vinyl can be used both indoors and outdoors, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained.
Extreme Tack Vinyl: Extreme Tack vinyl is white calendered vinyl material with a high tack adhesive that is specifically designed to adhere to low energy surfaces.

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your athletic banner needs to be precise, please ask your customer service representative to discuss your specific application.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Athletic Banner Finishing Options for Gymnasium Installation

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

Hems consist of one inch of the vinyl athletic banner material folded over and heated together to form a strong hem. We recommend hems for all athletic banners to increase durability for gymnasium installations.

You will have the following options when selecting hems and grommets for your athletic department banners:

Top and Bottom Only Hems – Standard finishing option for athletic banners.
All Four Sides Hems – All 4 sides of the banner will be heat welded and grommeted for maximum durability.

Pole Pockets for Athletic Banner Installation

Pole pockets consist of 2, 3, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of the athletic banner.

  • 2" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter

By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your athletic banner.

Pole pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners.

Reinforced Corners for Athletic Banners

Reinforced corners provide extra strength and are grommeted to each corner of the banner for long-lasting gymnasium displays.

Reinforced Hems for Athletic Banner Durability

Reinforced hems are a PVC-coated webbing which increases the strength of the athletic banner for championship recognition displays.

You cannot have reinforced hems with pole pockets.

Double-Sided Athletic Banner Finishing

We can finish double-sided athletic banners up to 150 square feet. Larger sizes require a custom quote.

To learn more, visit our vinyl banner finishing options page.

We do not recommend wind slits in banners. For more information, visit our wind slit banners page.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Athletic Banner Production & Turnaround Times

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your athletic banner preparation, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your championship banners ready.

1 Business Day Priority:

Timelines can be tight for athletic events. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option for urgent championship banner needs.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes may be available. Please contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.

2 Business Days Express:

Have an extra day, but still need your athletic banners quickly? The express option is ideal for upcoming games and tournaments.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes may be available. Please contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.

3 Business Days Standard:

This is our most popular fast turnaround option for athletic banners. Free and speedy for most custom athletic department orders.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes may be available. Please contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.

5 Business Days Saver:

If you're not in a rush for your athletic banners, you can save money by choosing our 5-Day Saver option.

  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes may be available. Please contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Athletic Banner Payment & Ordering Options

All athletic banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards for your athletic department banner orders. We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production. For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog.

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your athletic banner order.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Athletic Banner Delivery

If you have any questions about shipping your athletic banners, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your athletic banner will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

You will receive a tracking number once your athletic banner package has been shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large athletic banner orders.

After athletic banners have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the athletic banner is damaged in shipping, the damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after the initial scheduled delivery.

International Shipping Notes:

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS.

Shipping Methods Available for Athletic Banners:

  • Standard (3–5 Business Days)
  • Three Day (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day (2 Business Days)
  • Overnight (1 Business Day)
  • UPS Overnight AM

Economy Shipping
If choosing economy shipping, please add additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery. Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5–10 days depending on destination.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Gymnasium & Stadium Uses for Athletic Department Banners

We print thousands of athletic banners each year. If you need inspiration for designing your athletic banner, explore some popular ways below for how our customers use athletic department banners.

Sports and Athletics

  • Championship recognition banners
  • Team spirit displays for gymnasiums
  • Tournament announcement banners
  • Game day signage for stadiums
  • Stadium or field advertising displays
  • Sports banquet decorations

Education and Schools

  • Athletic department branding
  • Sports team support banners
  • School event promotions for athletic programs
  • Graduation banners for senior athletes
  • Athletic hall of fame displays

Events and Athletic Functions

  • Athletic award ceremonies
  • Sponsor recognition banners for sports programs
  • Athletic fundraising events
  • Sports camps and clinics
  • Athletic booster club displays

Indoor Gymnasium Installation

  • Championship banner displays
  • Retired jersey number banners
  • Conference title recognition
  • Athletic department mission displays
  • Team photo backdrop banners

Outdoor Stadium Applications

  • Stadium entrance banners
  • Concession stand advertising
  • Ticket booth signage
  • Athletic field identification
  • Tailgating area displays
PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Athletic Banner Artwork Requirements for Championship Printing

The file that prints best for athletic banners is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files for your championship banners. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you with your athletic banner artwork.

Artwork/Order Proofs for Athletic Banners

If you would like to double-check your athletic banner for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork and a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your athletic banner into production until you have sent your approval.

Color Match Proof System for Athletic Banners

If your athletic banner project is color critical (such as matching specific team colors), we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Athletic Banners for Championship Recognition

High-quality, high-resolution, and full-color athletic banners take your team recognition to the next level. At banners.com, we offer all that and more, like quick delivery and indoor durability perfect for gymnasium installations. Custom banners are a great way to promote your school's athletics and celebrate championship achievements.

Get a banner with your team's name and logo to display at your school, field, arena, or anywhere else your teams are playing. Use banners to recognize playoff appearances, championships, individual and team accomplishments, and any other achievements you want to publicize. Banners are also great on game day for things like ticket sales, concessions, tailgating, and welcoming fans to your facility.

We print custom full-color athletic banners up to 16 feet by 50 feet for athletic departments all over the U.S. Whatever signage your athletic department needs, Banners.com has you covered! Request a quote and start your athletic banner design today.

Did we answer all your questions?

If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300, and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you with your athletic banner needs.

Looking for something more specific? Custom sizing and specialty applications are available upon request through a custom quote! Ideal for special projects, unique sizes, and larger quantity orders.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Athletic Banner Frequently Asked Questions

What materials work best for indoor athletic banners?

For indoor gymnasium displays, we recommend 13 oz matte vinyl or fabric athletic banners. Both materials provide excellent color reproduction for team logos and championship text while maintaining durability for long-term display.

How long do athletic banners last in indoor gymnasiums?

When properly installed indoors, vinyl athletic banners can last 10+ years without fading. Fabric banners also provide excellent longevity for indoor championship displays with proper care.

What sizes are available for athletic department banners?

We offer athletic banners ranging from 1'x1' up to 8'x50'. For larger championship banners or custom dimensions, contact us for a custom quote.

Can you match specific team colors on athletic banners?

Yes! We offer a Color Match Proof System to ensure your athletic banners perfectly match your team's official colors. This is especially important for championship banners and official athletic department displays.

What finishing options work best for gymnasium installation?

For athletic banners hung in gymnasiums, we recommend pole pockets for clean installation or reinforced hems with grommets for maximum durability. The choice depends on your specific mounting system.

How quickly can you produce athletic banners for urgent events?

We offer 1-day priority production for urgent athletic banner needs, perfect for last-minute championship celebrations or unexpected tournament qualifications.

Do you offer double-sided athletic banners?

Yes, we can produce double-sided athletic banners up to 150 square feet. This is ideal for banners that will be viewed from both sides in gymnasiums or outdoor stadiums.

What file formats do you accept for athletic banner artwork?

We accept .eps (preferred), high-resolution .pdf, .jpg, and .tiff files for athletic banners. Our graphic design team can help optimize your team logos and championship artwork for best printing results.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
